title: $finish doesn't stop the simulation immediately when called inside `always` block

features.name: $finish in always block with procedural timing control
features.description: Code should include $finish system task called inside an always block that also uses procedural timing control #(expr)
features.snippet: reg clk; always #(PER/2) clk = ~clk; always begin $finish; end

features.name: while loop with clocking wait before $finish
features.description: Code should include a while loop with @(posedge clk) clocking waits followed by $finish inside an always block
features.snippet: always begin int cnt=0; while(cnt<3) begin cnt++; $display("loop %d",cnt); @(posedge clk); end $finish; end

features.name: procedural timing control clock generator with $finish
features.description: Code should include a clock generator using procedural timing control #(expr) alongside an always block that calls $finish
features.snippet: reg clk=0; always #(PER/2) clk=~clk; always begin $finish; end
